mainEntity.text: Best voice search phrases for Chicago AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use conversational phrases like 'best employment lawyer near Chicago' or 'Chicago workers comp timeline' for AEO voice optimization.[1][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Chicago firms target long-tail voice queries with natural language on sites. Schema enhances pickup; examples: 'How long for Chicago personal injury settlement?' Optimize homepages for local intent to capture mobile searches in traffic-heavy area.[4]
